message:
test(proptest): expand van_emde_boas, suffix_array, treap to 30+ tests each (ft-283h4.50)

- proptest_van_emde_boas.rs: 15 → 33 tests (+18 new property tests)
- proptest_suffix_array.rs: 16 → 33 tests (+17 new property tests)
- proptest_treap.rs: 16 → 32 tests (+16 new property tests)

All validated via rch on remote workers.
